summary: Ukrainian forces are conducting sustained drone strikes on Russian logistics and air defense infrastructure, with the 1st "Azov" Corps targeting routes around Donetsk and the SBS Birds striking multiple high-value targets in Crimea, including two Iskander bases and air defense systems. Russian operators from the Rubicon Center claim to have destroyed 105 Ukrainian UAVs on April 16 and 107 on April 15, coordinating with Russian Aerospace Forces to neutralize launch positions. On the ground, FPV drones are being used to kill Russian soldiers, including those attempting to surrender or assault using motorcycles, while Ukrainian forces employ electronic warfare to disrupt enemy drones and use drone detectors to survive attacks near Kostiantinivka.
